title: lass fruticosa
intro: Lass fruticosa, also known as desert lavender, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its fragrant purple flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of lass fruticosa include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and skincare products. Lass fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues and promote overall well-being.
